description.description: A brief summary of the novel.

coverImage.description: URL of the novel's cover image.

styleGuide.description: Instructions for the AI on writing style.

background.description: Markdown content for the novel's background/world-building.

characters.description: Markdown content for the novel's characters.

plotlines.description: Markdown content for the novel's plotlines/mission arcs.

items.description: Markdown content for the novel's items/artifacts.

targetPlatform.description: The platform where the novel is planned to be published.

platformAnalysis.description: AI-generated analysis of the target platform and trending books.

Chapter.title: Chapter
Chapter.description: A single chapter within a novel.

novelId.description: The ID of the parent novel.

content.description: The text content of the chapter.

status.description: The current state of the chapter.

globalRules.description: Global writing rules/inspiration for the user's AI assistant.

aiConfigs.description: JSON stringified array of AI configurations.

tokenUsage.description: JSON stringified object tracking token consumption.

/novels/{novelId}/chapters/{chapterId}.description: Sub-collection of chapters for a specific novel.
